summary.intent: Fix new PR review comments on moltis PR #484 and resolve all open review conversations.
summary.outcome: Added a missing slug assertion test for `_meta.json` parsing and a safety comment on the `Default` derive; committed and pushed fixes, resolving all open conversations.

repo: Skills parsing lives in crates/skills/src/parse.rs and crates/skills/src/types.rs
PR review cycles on moltis follow a pattern of fetching comment IDs and resolving threads via GitHub API after pushing fixes
Slug field is intentionally dual-populated after promotion to `name` — this is a documented design choice, not a bug

code.finding: Missing test: slug assertion was not covered for the `_meta.json` parsing path; added to close the gap
The `Default` derive required a safety comment explaining why it is intentional/safe in this context

workflow: Review rounds are tracked by fetching PR comment thread IDs and resolving them via Bash after each push
Previously resolved threads can appear in raw API output — need to filter to identify truly new comments

friction: First 3 review comments fetched were already-resolved ones from a prior round, requiring manual filtering to identify the 2 new comments
